APPEAL OF CIVIL JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-24-2012 Affirmed
MINI MINUTES: appellant, stan schuldiner, present. respondent attorney, wendy krog, present. matter submitted.

Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition To Appoint Arbitrator Or Issue A Ruling That Arbitration Is Not Required And The Matter May Be Litigatedq
Off Calendar Nov-29-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. WENDY C. KROG OF ROPERS MAJESKI LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 972-6336 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
STAN SCHULDINER, TEL. NO. (718) 761-8163, RESPONDENT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT STAN SCHULDINER'S Petition To Appoint Arbitrator Or Issue A Ruling That Arbitration Is Not Required And The Matter May Be Litigated is Denied. The subject correspondence sent on May 24, 2012 is a settlement offer and predates the court order confirming the arbitration award. Respondent's additional claim for violation of banking privacy laws is outside the scope of this action. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR # 11312 =(302/MJM)

Notice Of Hearing Petition To Confirm Aribtration Award
Off Calendar Jun-18-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. WENDY C. KROG OF ROPERS, MAJESKI & BENTLEY, TEL. NO. 972-6336 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
STAN SCHULDNER, TEL. NO. (710) 761-8163, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER CHASE BANK USA, N.A.'S Notice Of Hearing Petition To Confirm Aribtration Award IS Granted. The arbitrator's award is confirmed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: James Mcbride; Court Reporter: Teanna L. Ward, CSR No. 119118 = (302/JJM)

Petitioner Chase Bank Usa'S Motion To Consolidate Cases Csm-12-840804 With Case Cpf-11-511286
Off Calendar Jun-18-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. WENDY C. KROG OF ROPERS, MAJESKI & BENTLEY, TEL. NO. 972-6336 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
STAN SCHULDNER, TEL. NO. (710) 761-8163, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Petitioner Chase Bank USA'S Motion To Consolidate Cases Csm-12-840804 With Case Cpf-11-511286 is Denied. Chase Bank has not demonstrated that the two actions involve common questions of fact. Further, consolidation will not result in judicial economy. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: James Mcbride; Court Reporter: Teanna L. Ward, CSR No. 119118 = (302/JJM)

PETITIONER CHASE BANK USA, N.A. Petition To Confirm Aribtration Award. To be heard by Judge McBride on June 18, 2012 at 9:30 am in Department 302 due to Mr. Schuldiner's 170.6 challenge against Judge Kahn. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

Notice Motion To Dismiss Petition To Confirm Arb Award; Oppos To Petition To Confirm Arb Award
Off Calendar May-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Stan Schuldiner, Tel. 415.724.6862, respondent and moving party appearing on his own behalf.
Wendy C. Krog, Esq., of Ropers Majeski Kohn Bentley, Tel. 415.543.4800, appearing for petitioner and opposing party.

The matter was argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT STAN SCHULDINER's Motion To Dismiss Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Denied. Mr. Schuldiner is not entitled to the relief sought. Mr. Schuldiner waived any defect in service of the summons by filing this motion. Further, Mr. Schuldiner has not presented sufficient evidence to support vacating the arbitration award. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Loretta Najera CSR # 5153
